user.title: Set up Tri-State Cover
user.description: Configure a cover entity for a tri-state motor (Open → Stop → Close → Stop cycle) controlled by a single switch/button.

data_description.switch_entity: The switch entity that toggles the garage motor. Each activation cycles through: Open → Stop → Close → Stop.
data_description.travel_time: Time in seconds for a full travel from fully open to fully closed (or vice versa).
data_description.closed_sensor: Binary sensor that turns ON when the cover is fully closed. Used to calibrate position tracking.
data_description.open_sensor: Binary sensor that turns ON when the cover is fully open. Used to calibrate position tracking.
data_description.toggle_delay: Delay between rapid presses for direction reversal (triple-press). Increase if your motor misses presses.

abort.already_configured: This switch is already configured as a tri-state cover.

data_description.travel_time: Time in seconds for a full travel from fully open to fully closed (or vice versa).
data_description.closed_sensor: Binary sensor that turns ON when the cover is fully closed.
data_description.open_sensor: Binary sensor that turns ON when the cover is fully open.
data_description.toggle_delay: Delay between rapid presses for direction reversal.
